use_codes.desc: COMBINATION WITH STANDARD CYTARABINE AND ANTHRACYCLINE INDUCTION AND CYTARABINE CONSOLIDATION, AND AS MAINTENANCE MONOTHERAPY FOLLOWING CONSOLIDATION CHEMOTHERAPY, FOR ADULT PATIENTS WITH NEWLY DIAGNOSED FLT3-ITD POSITIVE ACUTE MYELOID LEUKEMIA

indications.text:
VANFLYTA is indicated in combination with standard cytarabine and anthracycline induction and
cytarabine consolidation, and as maintenance monotherapy following consolidation chemotherapy, for the
treatment of adult patients with newly diagnosed acute myeloid leukemia (AML) that is FLT3 internal
tan...
